name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Session 55 was a founder-driven UX + perf + identity hardening pass: GIF death-highlight encoder rewritten non-blocking; first-card readability hardened (PerkModal tier pill + DraftScreen 3-char-hex bug); adaptive frame-budget monitor flips a runtime perf flag exposed in the HUD; SettingsPanel collapsed to Quick + Advanced; weapons gated behind account-level progression with grandfathering; weekly mutation banner dismissible; auth-integration + extraction roadmaps written. Remaining work is human/data-gated launch execution plus the long-form auth and extraction roadmaps.
nextMilestone: Owner-side finish line: manual browser QA against `docs/QA_CHECKLIST.md`, add `VITE_POSTHOG_KEY`/`VITE_SENTRY_DSN`, capture production Lighthouse LCP/CLS and `home_v2_deploy` funnel deltas, run real-device QA, publish the Itch.io listing with the PNG launch assets, then observe post-launch replay/trust/balance signals before triggering the Supabase Auth migration in `docs/AUTH_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md`.
